source: Library of Congress, Prints & Photographs Division
license: No known restrictions on publication (public domain — pre-1928)
title: En route to the Klondike. Skagway
description: Stereograph view of Skagway during the Klondike Gold Rush showing the frontier town scattered across a cleared valley with snow-capped mountains behind. The town served as the gateway to the White Pass trail into the Yukon gold fields.
alt: Stereograph view of Skagway during the Klondike Gold Rush, showing the frontier town in a valley with snow-capped mountains behind
